description: Beta patch: localize new Trellis project docs and add the Codex-only Trellis document organizer skill.
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(cli): generate new-project Trellis human-readable docs in Chinese by default while preserving technical terms.
- feat(codex): install `.codex/skills/trellis-doc-organizer/SKILL.md` so Codex can organize existing Trellis task/spec/research docs in place and reduce downstream agent context.
notes: Beta patch on top of 0.6.0-beta.24. Install with `npm install -g psymoth@beta`, then run `trellis update` in Codex-enabled Trellis projects to install the new doc organizer skill. No migration command is required.
